meta.name: NVC Lighting live baseline
meta.description: 2026-07-12 live visual and interaction baseline for a JUHAO content-remix implementation. Source media is evidence only and is excluded from the public product.
meta.evidence_policy: WebGL and Canvas facts require SOURCE or PARTIAL evidence; visual approximations remain GUESS until baseline comparison passes.

color.palette_type: neutral monochrome foundation with page-specific accent colors

primary.role: source-site brand accent, selected text, controls and active states

secondary.role: high-contrast headings, dark sections and overlays

accent.role: current hero state colors; varies by campaign media

neutral.usage: body copy, muted copy, dividers, light and dark surfaces

color.contrast_strategy: large white-on-image hero sections alternate with dark-on-light editorial sections
color.juhao_translation: replace #008755 and campaign accents with approved JUHAO orange tokens while preserving luminance roles and section contrast

display.tracking: tight for Chinese, open for English

font_families.heading: Microsoft JhengHei, Source Han Sans CN, PingFang SC, Source Han Serif SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif
font_families.body: Microsoft JhengHei, Source Han Sans CN, PingFang SC, Source Han Serif SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif
font_families.latin_display: Nexa Book / Nexa Thin / Nexa Bold

typography.font_style_notes: Source uses very large light-weight English labels and regular-weight Chinese headings; iconfont and swiper-icons are not content fonts.

spacing.section_rhythm: full-viewport hero/feature sections alternating with 96-160px editorial padding

layout.grid_system: 84% centered content frame plus full-bleed media
layout.columns: asymmetric 2-column editorial layouts; 3-5 card or carousel tracks
layout.breakpoints: orientation-driven desktop/mobile split plus 700px compact type rule
layout.alignment_tendency: mixed: strict content frame with full-bleed cinematic sections

shape.border_usage: thin low-opacity rules; image and typography carry most hierarchy

elevation.shadow_style: minimal; depth is created by scale, overlay, blur and image layering
elevation.depth_cues: overlapping media, scale transitions, dark masks and WebGL displacement

iconography.style: custom outline glyphs and arrow controls
iconography.preferred_set: project-owned icon set; do not ship source iconfont

motion.easing: mostly cubic-bezier(0,0,0,1), ease-in-out and GSAP/TweenMax defaults
motion.entrance_pattern: fade/translate/clip reveals, staggered copy, image scale and media crossfade
motion.exit_pattern: opacity and transform with mask or displacement transitions
motion.philosophy: cinematic, media-led, stateful; motion is part of information hierarchy

components.button_style: outlined circular/arrow controls and filled pill CTAs
components.input_style: minimal underline or full-width search field
components.card_style: image-first cards with overlay copy and hover reveals
components.navigation_pattern: fixed transparent desktop nav with hover submenus; fixed mobile drawer with nested lists
components.modal_style: full-screen dark overlay with media/product detail and explicit close
components.list_style: large editorial rows, tabbed lists, carousels and progressive expansion

aesthetic.visual_metaphor: light reveals space, material and value
aesthetic.era_influence: late-2010s to mid-2020s Chinese corporate motion design

visual_language.ornamentation: subtle controls over high-impact photography and motion
visual_language.whitespace_usage: large isolated headings and generous editorial gaps
visual_language.visual_weight_distribution: dominant full-screen media balanced by small precise labels
visual_language.texture_usage: photographic light, shadow, architectural materials and shader distortion

composition.hierarchy_method: scale contrast, spatial isolation and moving image layers
composition.flow_direction: vertical narrative with horizontal carousel and product excursions
composition.grouping_strategy: full-screen rows, split text/media blocks, tab families and overlay details
composition.negative_space_role: gives large headlines and isolated controls authority

imagery.photo_treatment: full-bleed architectural and lighting photography with dark overlays and cover cropping
imagery.graphic_elements: grid lines, circular progress, hotspot markers, masks and media frames
imagery.pattern_usage: rare; structure comes from media and motion
imagery.image_shape: mostly rectangular/full-bleed, occasionally circular or scale-masked

interaction_feel.feedback_style: smooth state transitions with explicit arrows, counters and active labels
interaction_feel.hover_behavior: submenu reveals, image/copy swap, hotspot activation and cursor feedback
interaction_feel.loading_style: branded frame-sequence canvas with percentage progress
interaction_feel.microinteraction_density: medium-high on desktop, reduced on touch devices

brand_voice_in_ui.empty_state_approach: not sufficiently evidenced; JUHAO implementation uses clear next-step guidance
brand_voice_in_ui.error_tone: not evidenced on source; JUHAO implementation uses plain recovery language

overview.fallback_strategy: static poster and immediate content for reduced motion, unsupported WebGL or media failure

loader.type: 91-frame Canvas sequence with percentage and masked exit
loader.evidence: SOURCE: live #load DOM and interaction probe pointer interception

params.uniforms: time, progress, intensity, width, scaleX, scaleY, transition, radius, swipe, texture1, texture2, displacement, resolution
params.distortion: opposed UV offsets mixed by progress
params.evidence: SOURCE: live app.min.js hash-matched fragment shader

canvas_drawings.responsiveness: desktop canvases fit 1440x900; mobile switches media dimensions and control path
canvas_drawings.interaction: loading gate, autoplay media, slide state and timeline navigation

parallax.description: service/about media layers and scene rects

scroll_triggered_animations.animation_type: fade, translate, clip, number and section-state reveals

scroll_morphing.description: healthy/ESG long-form sections and media scale masks

image_effects.type: WebGL displacement, cover crop, scale reveal and media crossfade
image_effects.hover_transform: image/copy state swap and hotspot-driven scene change

cursor_effects.fallback: disabled for touch and reduced motion

visual_effects.composite_notes: Hero WebGL, frame sequences and investment canvas require baseline-first verification. JUHAO translation keeps layout and state rhythm but substitutes brand color, text, media and data.
